title: Attach Files into Calendar Syncs
excerpt: When syncing the timeline of an item with your calendar (in my case, Google Calendar), It would be wonderful, if it could also attach any of the files on that item (or even better, in the subitems too) onto that Calendar…

posts.author: Charlsie (Charlsie)
posts.cookedHtml:
When syncing the timeline of an item with your calendar (in my case, Google Calendar), It would be wonderful, if it could also attach any of the files on that item (or even better, in the subitems too) onto that Calendar event!
Not everyone in my team has access to Monday.com so they use the calendar to find files associated with certain events. If we could entirely use Monday to create these events with attached files, this would be an incredible upgrade to our productivity!
